Event: Corrupted Magic Well - May 2025
Event Date: 21/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T114
Precision Plumage Totem

Once in a while, the totem owner flies into a rage. They increase in size and all their stats are increased by 20% for 4 sec. When attacking, the unit also removes 3 random positive effects from a random enemy unit.

Requirements: 90

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
